name: st2
description: CLI for StackStorm event-driven automation platform

name: -t
--token
options.description: Access token for user authentication. Get ST2_AUTH_TOKEN from the environment variables by default

name: --api-key
options.description: Api Key for user authentication. Get ST2_API_KEY from the environment variables by default

name: -j
--json
options.description: Print output in JSON format

name: -y
--yaml
options.description: Print output in YAML format

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show this help and exit

name: --attr
options.description: List of attributes to include in the output. 'all' or unspecified will return all attributes

name: -d
--detail
options.description: Display full detail of the execution in table format

name: -k
--key
options.description: If result is type of JSON, then print specific key-value pair; dot notation for nested JSON is supported

name: --delay
options.description: How long (in milliseconds) to delay the execution before scheduling

name: --tail
options.description: Automatically start tailing new execution

name: --auto-dict
options.description: Automatically convert list items to dictionaries when colons are detected. (NOTE - this parameter and its functionality will be deprecated in the next release in favor of a more robust conversion method)

name: --trace-tag
--trace_tag
options.description: A trace tag string to track execution later

name: --trace-id
options.description: Existing trace id for this execution

name: -a
--async
options.description: Do not wait for action to finish

name: -e
--inherit-env
options.description: Pass all the environment variables which are accessible to the CLI as 'env' parameter to the action. Note: Only works with python, local and remote runners

name: -u
--user
options.description: User under which to run the action (admins only)

generators.js_source:
async function(V,K){let F=V.find(c=>c.includes(":")),S=V.find(c=>/^-.*n.*/.test(c)),M;if(F){let{stdout:c}=await K({command:"bash",args:["-c","dscl . -list /Groups PrimaryGroupID | tr -s ' '| sort -r"]});M=c}else{let{stdout:c}=await K({command:"bash",args:["-c","dscl . -list /Users UniqueID | tr -s ' '| sort -r"]});M=c}return M.split(`
`).map(c=>c.split(" ")).map(c=>({name:S?c[1]:c[0],description:F?`Group - ${S?c[0]:`gid: ${c[1]}`}`:`User - ${S?c[0]:`uid: ${c[1]}`}`,icon:F?"\u{1F465}":"\u{1F464}",priority:90}))}

generators.js_source:
async function(V,K){let F=V.find(c=>c.includes(":")),S=V.find(c=>/^-.*n.*/.test(c)),M;if(F){let{stdout:c}=await K({command:"bash",args:["-c","dscl . -list /Groups PrimaryGroupID | tr -s ' '| sort -r"]});M=c}else{let{stdout:c}=await K({command:"bash",args:["-c","dscl . -list /Users UniqueID | tr -s ' '| sort -r"]});M=c}return M.split(`
`).map(c=>c.split(" ")).map(c=>({name:S?c[1]:c[0],description:F?`Group - ${S?c[0]:`gid: ${c[1]}`}`:`User - ${S?c[0]:`uid: ${c[1]}`}`,icon:F?"\u{1F465}":"\u{1F464}",priority:90}))}
